name: Buttermilk Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour two round layer pans, 8 or 9 inches.
2. Measure all ingredients into a large mixing bowl.
3. Blend the ingredients together, scraping the sides of the bowl occasionally.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes, or until a wooden toothpick inserted comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pans.
7. This cake is wonderful with a lemon frosting or a rich chocolate frosting.
